## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`cd apps/api && pytest`)
- [ ] New tests added for the change
- [ ] Lint passes (`cd apps/api && ruff check .`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I've added type hints where applicable
- [ ] I've updated documentation (if needed)
- [ ] I've added logging/metrics for new operations (if applicable)
- [ ] I've verified tenant isolation is maintained
- [ ] My changes don't introduce new security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I've tested the changes locally
